customproperties.cVisualizerStackScript:
on resizeStack
  set the rect of group 1 of me to the rect of this card of me
  send "resize" to group 1 of me
end resizeStack

on commandKeyDown pKey
  if pKey is "w" then
    close me
  end if
  pass commandKeyDown
end commandKeyDown
